name: Feature request
about: Propose a concrete improvement that fits the current Mycelium direction
title: "feat: "

## Problem

What user or operator problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Why this fits Mycelium

Explain how it supports the current direction:
- single-host routing first
- honest runtime behavior
- observability over magic

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve this?

## Notes

Add any implementation constraints, examples, or trade-offs.
